creator: rozhuk.im@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Eugene Grosbein from comment #28)
I change "do-install" to "install" and "post-stage" to "post-install" and got error:
===>   Generating temporary packing list
make: cannot open Makefile.

make: stopped in /tmp/ports/usr/ports/www/rutorrent/work/ruTorrent-28553451b43d00ea9cdc3411be50637acaf82067
*** Error code 2

Also post-install already used for "post-install-EXAMPLES-on" and I am not sure about execute order, it may change plist content.

Anyway, since it work - I do not care how hooks named and what porters handbook suggest.


More interesting part is how to convert php functions names (from function_exists()) to ports that required.
